verbGlossary.GOVERNED BY: {source} or approval is required and regulated by {target} or standard (e.g., building permit governed by IBC chapter requirements for the occupancy type)
verbGlossary.REVIEWED AGAINST: Plan review or regulatory review evaluates submitted documents for compliance with {target} (e.g., building department plan review checked against IBC structural provisions, fire marshal review checked against NFPA fire protection standards)
verbGlossary.ENFORCES: {source} or approval authority verifies and enforces {target} requirements on the jobsite (e.g., AHJ inspection enforcing IBC egress requirements, health department enforcing ADA accessibility provisions)
verbGlossary.ISSUED PER: {source} or approval is formally granted upon demonstrated compliance with {target} requirements (e.g., certificate of occupancy issued per IBC Section 111 after final inspection)
verbGlossary.CONDITIONED BY: {source} approval includes conditions or stipulations imposed by {target} (e.g., building permit conditioned by energy code insulation and HVAC efficiency requirements, ADA accessible route requirements attached as permit conditions)
verbGlossary.SUPPORTS: {source}provides documentation that contributes toward meeting the target sustainability certification (e.g., stormwater permit SWPPP documentation supporting LEED water management credits)
verbGlossary.FILED UNDER: {source} notification is submitted and categorized using {target} hazard taxonomy (e.g., OSHA notification filed under the applicable OSHA hazard category for the jobsite condition)
verbGlossary.ADDRESSES: {source}plan identifies and mitigates hazards defined by {target} classification (e.g., site safety plan addressing OSHA fall protection and excavation hazard categories)
verbGlossary.LOGGED PER: Record is documented following {target} recordkeeping requirements (e.g., OSHA notification logged per OSHA 300 log format and reporting thresholds)
verbGlossary.CLASSIFIED UNDER: {source} or approval is categorized using {target} taxonomy (e.g., trade permit classified under MasterFormat division for the relevant trade scope, zoning approval classified under OmniClass facility type)
verbGlossary.SCOPED BY: {source}inspection scope is defined by {target} testing and verification requirements (e.g., structural steel special inspection scoped by specification section 05 12 00 requirements)
verbGlossary.TESTED PER: {source}inspection or third-party test follows {target} prescribed testing protocol (e.g., fire suppression system tested per NFPA 25 inspection and testing requirements)
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTED PER: {source}record is captured in the format required by {target} (e.g., labor compliance documentation formatted per OSHA recordkeeping requirements)
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED TO: {source} or inspection metric is compared against {target} published baseline or industry threshold (e.g., inspection pass rate benchmarked to IBC-mandated inspection categories)
verbGlossary.SEGMENTED BY: {source} metric is broken down by {target} for comparative analysis (e.g., permit cycle time segmented by MasterFormat mapping to identify slow-clearing trades, inspection pass rate segmented by safety classification category)
